sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bits (id UInt32, value Int32, tupleData Tuple(Int32, Int32));
SELECT id, bitTestAll(value, 0, 1, tupleElement(tupleData, 0), NULL) AS allBits FROM test_bits WHERE allBits = 0;
SELECT id, bitTestAll(value, tupleElement(tupleData, 0), tupleElement(tupleData, 1)) AS allBits FROM test_bits GROUP BY id HAVING allBits = 1;
SELECT id, bitTestAll(value, 0, 1, 3, 5, tupleElement(tupleData, 1)) AS testResult FROM test_bits WHERE testResult > 0 ORDER BY testResult;
WITH bitResult AS (SELECT id, bitTestAll(value, 0, 1) AS result FROM test_bits) SELECT result, COUNT(*) FROM bitResult GROUP BY result HAVING result = 1;
SELECT a.id, b.value, bitTestAll(b.value, 0, 1, 2) FROM test_bits AS a JOIN (SELECT id, value FROM test_bits WHERE value > 0) AS b ON a.id = b.id;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, bitTestAll(value, 1, 2, 3) FROM test_bits WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
